strategy: Storm boss (18,495) with a healing minion. The minion is the problem: below ~50% health it Sacrifices itself to heal Rackum, and it Regenerates itself whenever it takes damage.
Strangle the minion to shut off the Sacrifice heal (hitting again re-triggers it, so re-apply Strangle as needed).
He is stunnable; a stun can steal a turn during your burst.

Either kill the minion outright in one big hit (so it cannot Sacrifice-heal at low health) or Strangle it and focus Rackum. Blade up and burst; do not let the fight drag while the minion recycles heals.
cheatNotes: When the minion drops below ~50% health it Sacrifices itself to heal Rackum. Kill it in one hit or Strangle it to stop the heal.
Strangle on the minion dispels the Sacrifice heal, but hitting it again re-triggers the cheat. Re-apply Strangle as needed.
The minion Regenerates itself whenever it takes damage, so chip damage is wasted. Burst it down or leave it Strangled.
